finding_results.notes: Replaced the recap-heavy post-Miren coda with a brief aftermath sequence, kept cosmology to one short paragraph, and ended on Gavin's concrete return to the page.
Added immediate aftermath pressure that reaches Gavin in the sub-collection, then staged the sensory threshold at the Great Hall before he turns back.
Added a direct aftermath encounter in the ruined corridor and Great Hall threshold, including visible triage damage, a body under a sheet, and Duncan carrying water.

summary: Tightened the closing movement, staged a direct Great Hall aftermath threshold scene, and returned the chapter to Gavin bleeding onto the manuscript and continuing the work.
